name: Hyperconnect
description: Seoul-based global video and live-streaming APIs/SDKs — WebRTC chat, video and messaging for apps.

seo.title: Hyperconnect — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: Hyperconnect: Seoul-based global video and live-streaming APIs/SDKs — WebRTC chat, video and messaging for apps.

when_to_use: WebRTC video and audio SDK for consumer app developers
Live streaming and real-time messaging APIs from Azar/Helo team
Low-latency video calling SDK for dating and social apps
Global WebRTC infrastructure with proven scale from Azar
Real-time communication backend for apps with Asian audiences

pros: Proven WebRTC stack behind Azar at huge scale
Live video, chat and AI moderation bundled
cons: Mostly aimed at consumer social and livestream apps
Less transparent pricing than US competitors
review.verdict: Solid option for Asia-focused social/live-video apps that want a battle-tested stack, but not a self-serve API.
review.best_for: Consumer social and live-streaming apps targeting Asian markets
review.not_for: B2B SaaS wanting transparent pay-as-you-go WebRTC
